<!--
This repo packages AWS-native deployment for the Claude Apps Gateway. It is
NOT the gateway binary itself. For binary/protocol requests, see
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/claude-apps-gateway (and their support paths).

Good fits for this repo:
  - New toggles/profiles (e.g. Foundry upstream, Fargate Spot, IPv6 CIDRs)
  - Cleaner orchestration flows
  - Additional docs / gotchas / regional caveats
  - Support for other IdPs beyond the templates
-->

## The problem
<!-- What friction / gap does this address? -->

## Proposed behavior
<!-- What would you like the repo (deploy-all.sh / a template / docs) to do? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Any other approach, or reasons an existing profile/toggle doesn't work. -->

## Impact
- Who benefits? (greenfield peers / BYO enterprises / both)
- Backward-compat: does this change existing deployments? (If yes, describe.)
